name: Bitters Broccoli Au Gratin
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces chopped broccoli, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a medium-light white sauce by starting with 1 1/4 cups milk, 1 scant teaspoon cornstarch, and other necessary ingredients.
2. Stir in the cheese until melted.
3. Add bitters, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to the sauce.
4. Place cooked broccoli in a 1 to 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Pour the sauce over the broccoli to cover and coat it evenly.
6. Top with buttered crumbs (1/3 cup Italian-seasoned bread crumbs mixed with 1 tablespoon softened butter).
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for about 20 minutes, or until bubbly.
Romanoff Variation - Add 1 tablespoon sour cream to the cheese sauce and substitute Worcestershire sauce for the bitters. Omit the crumbs and toss with chopped fresh parsley.
